title: Type Operators, Mapped Types, Conditional Types, and Templates · Guided Contract Studio
summary: Derive form, event, and patch contracts from one domain model without duplicating names or accepting impossible states. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of a derived contract and event-type library while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use type-context typeof to derive from runtime declarations without confusing it with runtime typeof.
Map over property keys with modifiers, key remapping, and value transforms while preserving intended optionality.
Use distributive and non-distributive conditional types with explicit true and false branch meaning.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
